name: claude-code-ollama
description: Run Claude Code CLI via LiteLLM against Ollama Cloud and OpenRouter

scripts.test:litellm: curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:4000/v1/messages -H 'x-api-key: sk-claude-bridge-local' -H 'anthropic-version: 2023-06-01' -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"model":"claude-ollama","max_tokens":30,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"say ok"}]}'
